query:
SELECT handle AS "handle!"
        FROM ciphertexts_branch
        WHERE handle = ANY($1::BYTEA[])
          AND ciphertext_version = $2
          AND producer_block_hash = '\\x'::BYTEA
        UNION
        SELECT handle
        FROM ciphertexts
        WHERE handle = ANY($1::BYTEA[])
          AND ciphertext_version = $2
